---
title: "Quadratic Interpolative Search"
bibliography: ../../references.bib
---

← [Numerical Methods](./)

Source inspiration: [@mathewsSite].

Source inspiration: [@mathewsSite].

## Animation Focus

This page will prioritize intuitive animations that show the algorithm behavior step by step.

### Planned animation ideas

- Visual state evolution of the method
- Parameter sensitivity controls
- Convergence and failure side-by-side comparison

## Derivation Notes (Planned)

Short derivations will be added to explain the core equations and assumptions.

## Worked Example (Planned)

A compact numerical example with intermediate steps will be included.

## Implementation Notes (Planned)

Implementation details, numerical stability notes, and practical pitfalls will be added.

## Legacy Animation Inventory (Stub)

- Legacy module page: [Quadratic Interpolative Search](http://localhost:8000/n2003/QuadraticSearchMod.html) (ok)
- Animation links found in module Animations paragraph: 4
- Unique animation portals: 2

### Animation Portals

1. [Quadratic Search](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Optimization/Quadratic1/Quadratic.html) (ok)
2. [Cubic Search](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Optimization/Cubic1/Cubic.html) (ok)

- Animation item links found: 2

### Animation Items

1. [Quadratic Interpolative Search](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Optimization/Quadratic1/Quadraticaa.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
2. [Cubic Interpolative Search](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Optimization/Cubic1/Cubicaa.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
